_meta.description: 30-second SaaS product ad. Hook with a bold stat, problem setup, product demo, social proof, CTA. Fast-cut rhythm optimised for vertical social.

sections.name: Hook
sections.notes: Open on the pain point or a bold number. No title yet — let the visual land first.

sections.name: Problem
sections.notes: Show the before-state: friction, wasted time, confusion. Keep cuts tight.

sections.name: Demo
sections.notes: Screen recording or product walkthrough. 3–4 cuts showing the core flow. Add UI captions if helpful.

sections.name: Proof
sections.notes: Testimonial quote, logo wall, or metric. One clean cut.

sections.name: CTA
sections.notes: Brand name + action line. Hold last frame 1s before fade.

clips.notes: Punchy opener — a face, a number on screen, or a product close-up. No slow pans.
Show the friction: messy spreadsheet, failed search, error state.
Second beat of the problem. Can be a talking-head reacting to pain point.
Wide view of the product UI. Establish the interface before drilling in.
First core feature interaction. Screen recording preferred.
Second core feature. Show the result, not just the click.
The aha moment — dashboard lit up, task complete, time saved.
Testimonial clip, metric card, or logo wall. Keep it credible and brief.
Brand visual with product name and action line. End on a clean still.
